name: functions
description: Cloud Functions para plataforma de finanzas

scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "firebase emulators:start --only firestore,storage --import=../emulator-data --export-on-exit=../emulator-data" "node -r dotenv/config lib/dev.js"
scripts.dev:bot: npm run build && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 node -r dotenv/config lib/dev.js
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,storage --import=../emulator-data --export-on-exit=../emulator-data
scripts.deploy:test: bash ../scripts/switch-env.sh test && firebase deploy --only functions && bash ../scripts/set-webhook.sh
scripts.deploy:prod: bash ../scripts/switch-env.sh prod && firebase deploy --only functions && bash ../scripts/set-webhook.sh
